# Role Onboarding & Handoff Checklist

Use this checklist when onboarding a new role member to a project, or when handing off responsibilities (e.g., to Support, a new PM, or a replacement Engineer).

Project:
Owner initiating handoff/onboarding:
Date:

## Access & Accounts
- [ ] Confirm GitHub access and team membership
- [ ] Confirm access to project boards and project repo (read/write as needed)
- [ ] Confirm access to CI/CD dashboard and monitoring (if applicable)
- [ ] Confirm access to product analytics dashboards

## Documentation to Read
- [ ] Project One-pager (project README)
- [ ] Project plan and milestone timeline
- [ ] Role Interaction Matrix (docs/templates/role-interaction-matrix.md)
- [ ] Release notes and runbooks (if joining near release)
- [ ] Risk register and recent retrospectives

## Meetings & Introductions
- [ ] Intro call with PM and PdM
- [ ] Team kickoff / sprint planning attendance
- [ ] Pairing session with outgoing role owner (if available)
- [ ] Schedule recurring syncs (e.g., weekly check-ins) for first month

## Role-specific Setup
- [ ] Codebase walkthrough and local dev setup
- [ ] Access to design files and style tokens (for Designers)
- [ ] Access to dashboards and data definitions (for Data Analysts)
- [ ] Access to security runbooks and on-call info (for Security Engineers)

## Handoff Items
- [ ] Current action items and open tickets transferred
- [ ] Known risks and mitigation status explained
- [ ] Pending releases or deployments and next steps
- [ ] Key contacts and escalation paths documented

## Acceptance
- [ ] New owner confirms they have access, understands priorities, and knows immediate next steps
- [ ] Outgoing owner marks handoff complete and provides contact window for follow-up

Notes / special instructions:
